episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Judas Tree
episodeList.description: Jonathan Creek is called upon by his friend, investigator Joey Ross, to look into a series of mysterious and spooky events at a house called Green Lanterns.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Omega Man
episodeList.description: Maddy is contacted by a man who makes a living investigating the existence of aliens.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Problem At Gallows Gate (Part 1)
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Jonathan Creek/The Problem At Gallows Gate (Part 1).mp4
episodeList.description: A young wealthy eccentric commits suicide by jumping off a balcony after discovering his girlfriend with someone else.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Problem At Gallows Gate (Part 2)
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Jonathan Creek/The Problem At Gallows Gate (Part 2).mp4
episodeList.description: Jonathan and Maddy begin to realise that the man Kitty saw may not have even died in the first place.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Reconstituted Corpse
episodeList.description: Zola Zbzewski has made her money and reputation by being one of the most cosmetically altered women in Britain.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Murder on the Links
episodeList.description: While Poirot and Hastings are enjoying their holiday in France, they are approached by a man who fears for his life.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Murder on the Orient Express
episodeList.description: Hercule Poirot travels to London on the Orient Express.

episodeList.title: POIROT: One, Two, Buckle My Shoe
episodeList.description: Shortly after Poirot pays a visit to his dentist he is found shot in his office.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Peril At End House (Part 1)
episodeList.description: Poirot and Hastings are holidaying when they meet a young girl who casually mentions that she has at least thrice escaped certain death.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Peril At End House (Part 2)
episodeList.description: Poirot and Hastings are holidaying when they meet a young girl who casually mentions that she has at least thrice escaped certain death.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Problem at Sea
episodeList.description: Poirot and Hastings embark on a cruise ship to Egypt.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Sad Cypress
episodeList.description: Young Elinor Carlisle is tried in court for first murdering her aunt for money and then also her aunt's protégée who stole the heart of Elinor's fiancé.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Taken at the Flood
episodeList.description: The young Rosaleen Cloade and her brother David are the only survivors of a gas explosion.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The ABC Murders
episodeList.description: Poirot starts receiving mocking letters with allusions to crimes-to-be, signed "ABC".

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Adventure of Johnnie Waverly
episodeList.description: Country squire Marcus Waverly and his wife Ada ask Poirot to help before their son Johnnie is kidnapped.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Adventure of the Cheap Flat
episodeList.shortName: The Adventure of the Cheap Flat
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/The Adventure of the Cheap Flat.mp4
episodeList.description: Poirot and Hastings meet a couple at a party who have just rented a flat in a fashionable district for an implausibly cheap price.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Adventure of the Clapham Cook
episodeList.shortName: The Adventure of the Clapham Cook
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/The Adventure of the Clapham Cook.mp4
episodeList.description: Mrs Todd prods Poirot into investigating the disappearance of her cook, Miss Eliza Dunn.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: The Mirror Crack'd from Side to Side
episodeList.shortName: The Mirror Crack'd from Side to Side
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Miss Marple/The Mirror Crack'd from Side to Side.m4v
episodeList.description: Hollywood comes to St Mary Mead when faded movie star Marina Gregg takes up residence for a local film shoot.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: The Murder at the Vicarage
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Miss Marple/The Murder at the Vicarage.mp4
episodeList.description: When a colonel is murdered, Miss Marple is faced with a long list of suspects.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: They Do It With Mirrors
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Miss Marple/They Do It With Mirrors.m4v
episodeList.description: At an estate turned reformatory school, Miss Marple visits her old school chum Carrie Louise.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: Angel Hair
episodeList.description: A pop star's husband is baffled as to how a woman can regrow a full head of hair barely two days after she had it all hacked off in a hoax kidnap ransom video.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: Black Canary
episodeList.description: An illusionist, whose twin sister died when an escape trick went wrong is found dead in her snow-covered garden.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: Danse Macabre
episodeList.description: A writer is shot dead on Halloween by a man in a skeleton costume who subsequently takes her unconscious daughter hostage and locks himself in the garage.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: Ghost's Forge
episodeList.description: An old friend of Maddy's wants her and Jonathan to investigate a house supposedly called Ghost's Forge.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Clocks
episodeList.description: Sheila Webb, a girl working for a secretarial service, is summoned to the house of a customer.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Cornish Mystery
episodeList.description: An ordinary middle-aged woman, Mrs Pengelley, visits Poirot and tells him of her horrid suspicion: her husband is trying to poison her.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Disappearance of Mr Davenheim
episodeList.description: A well-known banker, Mr Davenheim, has disappeared.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Double Clue
episodeList.description: Following a string of robberies, Poirot helps Chief Inspector Japp try to find the jewel thief.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Dream
episodeList.description: The rich and eccentric owner of a pie factory consults Poirot about a troubling dream in which he commits suicide.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Hollow
episodeList.description: Poirot is invited to The Hollow, a splendid country retreat of the Angkatell family.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Incredible Theft
episodeList.description: Poirot is invited to a dinner party thrown by the Mayfields, as Mrs Mayfield fears her husband might become indiscreet in the presence of a suspected foreign spy.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Kidnapped Prime Minister
episodeList.description: The Prime Minister has been kidnapped and Poirot has thirty-two and a quarter hours to find him.

episodeList.title: POIROT: After the Funeral
episodeList.description: The wealthy Richard Abernethie changes his will in a curious way and dies unexpectedly.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Appointment with Death
episodeList.description: Upon visiting an archaeological dig in Syria, Poirot gets to know a family of adopted children.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Cards on the Table
episodeList.description: The mysterious Mr Shaitana invites eight guests to a dinner party.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Cat Among the Pigeons
episodeList.description: In the wake of a violent revolution, Princess Shaista is sent away to the safety of Meadowbank girls' school along with a trove of rubies.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Curtain; Poirot's Last Case
episodeList.description: After almost thirty years apart, Hercule Poirot, now crippled with arthritis is reunited with his old companion Captain Hastings.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Dead Man's Folly
episodeList.description: Mrs Ariadne Oliver is asked to stage a murder hunt for the party at Nasse House, the country residence of the Folliat family.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Dead Man's Mirror
episodeList.description: A dislikeable man who hired Poirot to investigate the possibly shady dealings of his business associate, is murdered shortly after.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Death in the Clouds
episodeList.description: When one of the passangers on Poirot's flight is murdered via a poisoned dart found under the Detective's seat, Poirot decides to help clear his name.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Death on the Nile
episodeList.description: Poirot embarks on a cruise ship on the Nile, where he gets to know a rich American heiress on her honeymoon.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Double Sin
episodeList.description: A dissatisfied Poirot takes Hastings on holiday to Devon.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Dumb Witness
episodeList.description: An elderly lady of considerable wealth tells Poirot of her fear that one of her relatives is trying to kill her.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Elephants Can Remember
episodeList.description: Ariadne Oliver wishes to unravel the mystery behind the deaths of her goddaughter's parents.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Evil under the Sun
episodeList.description: A quiet holiday at a secluded hotel in Devon is all that Hercule Poirot wants.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Four and Twenty Blackbirds
episodeList.description: Henry Gascoigne, an elderly man and a regular at the Bishop's Chophouse restaurant, deviates from his usual eating habits.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Hallowe'en Party
episodeList.description: A girl who claims to have witnessed a murder is found drowned in the apple-bobbing tub at a children's Halloween party.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Hercule Poirot's Christmas
episodeList.description: Obnoxious multi-millionaire Simeon Lee unexpectedly invites his family to gather at his home for Christmas.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Hickory Dickory Dock
episodeList.description: An outbreak of apparent kleptomania at a student hostel is not normally the sort of crime that arouses Hercule Poirot's interest.

episodeList.title: POIROT: How Does Your Garden Grow
episodeList.description: At a flower show, Poirot is approached by an mysterious woman in a wheelchair.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Jewel Robbery at the Grand Metropolitan
episodeList.shortName: Jewel Robbery at the Grand Metropolitan
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/Jewel Robbery at the Grand Metropolitan.mp4
episodeList.description: Poirot is holidaying in Brighton on his doctor's orders but gets dragged into an investigation when the pearl necklace is brazenly stolen.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Lord Edgware Dies
episodeList.description: The glamorous Jane Wilkinson is strongly suspected of murdering her husband, the fourth Baron Edgware, so that she could re-marry.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Mrs McGinty's Dead
episodeList.description: The murder of Mrs McGinty, a simple village charwoman, seems a straightforward enough affair – but Inspector Spence is not satisfied.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Murder in Mesopotamia
episodeList.description: When Poirot and Hastings are visiting a promising archeological dig on their holiday in Iraq, the Detective is sought out by a woman troubled by nasty letters with death-threats.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Adventure of the Egyptian Tomb
episodeList.shortName: The Adventure of the Egyptian Tomb
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/The Adventure of the Egyptian Tomb.mp4
episodeList.description: Poirot and Hastings travel to Egypt to investigate a group of archaeologists dropping dead after opening an allegedly cursed ancient tomb.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Adventure of the Italian Nobleman
episodeList.shortName: The Adventure of the Italian Nobleman
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/The Adventure of the Italian Nobleman.mp4
episodeList.description: Poirot helps solve the murder of an Italian nobleman of unsavoury reputation who happens to be the employer of Miss Lemon's new suitor.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Adventure of the Western Star
episodeList.shortName: The Adventure of the Western Star
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/The Adventure of the Western Star.mp4
episodeList.description: A famous Belgian film star consults Poirot about a series of letters threatening that her celebrated diamond will soon be stolen.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Affair at the Victory Ball
episodeList.shortName: The Affair at the Victory Ball
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/The Affair at the Victory Ball.mp4
episodeList.description: Poirot and Hastings attend the Victory Ball, a classical masquarade where every guest is dressed as someone famous.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Big Four
episodeList.description: With the help of his old friends Captain Hastings, Miss Lemon and Inspector Japp, Hercule Poirot investigates a series of carefully planned and executed murders.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Case of the Missing Will
episodeList.shortName: The Case of the Missing Will
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/The Case of the Missing Will.mp4
episodeList.description: A rich, terminally ill man asks Poirot to be executor of his new will, in which he intends to leave the whole estate to his ward Violet Wilson.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Murder in the Mews
episodeList.description: "A good night for a murder," says Hastings while he, Inspector Japp and Poirot are enjoying the festivities of Guy Fawkes night.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The King of Clubs
episodeList.description: Poirot and Hastings investigate the death of film studio owner Henry Reedburn at the request of Prince Paul of Maurania.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Labours of Hercules
episodeList.description: Hercule Poirot picks up on the trail of the ingenious thief Marascaud and devises a trap with the assistance of the Metropolitan Police.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Lost Mine
episodeList.description: The director of Poirot's bank consults the Detective after the disappearance of Mr Wu Ling who was due to sell the bank a map leading to a Burmese mine abundant with silver.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Million Dollar Bond Robbery
episodeList.description: After a bank clerc charged with overseeing a million dollars' worth of American bonds is poisoned, the bank calls in Poirot.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Murder of Roger Ackroyd
episodeList.description: Poirot reminisces about an older case in which Roger Ackroyd, the elderly, stingy millionaire disliked by many, was found murdered in cold blood.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Mysterious Affair at Styles
episodeList.description: After WWI, Captain Hastings is invited to Styles Court, where he meets his old friend Poirot again.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Mystery of Hunter's Lodge
episodeList.description: Poirot accompanies Hastings on a shooting party at the Hunter's Lodge, but is soon struck down with a flu.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Mystery of the Blue Train
episodeList.shortName: The Mystery of the Blue Train
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/The Mystery of the Blue Train.mp4
episodeList.description: While travelling on the Blue Train between Calais and Nice, Poirot gets mixed up in the investigation of the brutal murder of American heiress Ruth Kettering.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Mystery of the Spanish Chest
episodeList.shortName: The Mystery of the Spanish Chest
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/The Mystery of the Spanish Chest.mp4
episodeList.description: The charming Mrs Clayton begs Poirot for protection from her jealous husband.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Plymouth Express
episodeList.description: Australian mining entrepreneur Gordon Halliday hires Poirot to look into the activities of one of his daughter's suitors.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Theft of the Royal Ruby
episodeList.shortName: The Theft of the Royal Ruby
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Poirot/The Theft of the Royal Ruby.mp4
episodeList.description: During Christmas holidays, Poirot gets a visit from the Egyptian prince whose royal ruby has been stolen by a prostitute.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Third Floor Flat
episodeList.description: Young people return from a night out, but they have to use the coal lift because they have lost the keys to the apartment.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Tragedy at Marsdon Manor
episodeList.description: Poirot and Hastings travel to Marsdon Leigh in response to a letter about an insoluble murder.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Underdog
episodeList.description: Poirot investigates the violent death of the CEO of a chemical company whose list of enemies seems to be without end.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Veiled Lady
episodeList.description: Poirot is approached by a heavily veiled woman, Lady Millicent Castle Vaughan.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Yellow Iris
episodeList.description: The wealthy Barton Russell throws a dinner party in remebrance of his wife Iris's death by inviting the same people that were present the night of her murder.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Third Girl
episodeList.description: An unbalanced young heiress confides in Poirot that she might have killed someone, but runs away without explaining further.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Three Act Tragedy
episodeList.description: A well-liked clergyman with no enemy in the world chokes to death at a party thrown by the renowned Sir Charles Cartwright.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Triangle at Rhodes
episodeList.description: Poirot is enjoying his holiday in Rhodes, but human drama never seems to be too far away.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Wasps' Nest
episodeList.description: Poirot runs into his old friend John Harrison at a village fete and sets out to prevent a murder.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: A Caribbean Mystery
episodeList.description: While holidaying in Barbados, Miss Marple is bored to tears by a dotty Major who tells tall tales of knowing a murderer.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: A Murder is Announced
episodeList.description: A party game goes wrong and a young Swiss man is dead.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: A Pocketful of Rye
episodeList.description: When the members of a wealthy banking family start dropping like flies, Miss Marple is reminded of the old nursery rhyme.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: At Bertram's Hotel
episodeList.description: False identities, larceny, and a crime ring are only the tip of the tentacle when Miss Marple stays in a posh London hotel.(modelled after Brown's Hotel) where nothing is what it seems.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: Nemesis
episodeList.description: Miss Marple is sent on a mission from beyond the grave to clear a dead man's son.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: Sleeping Murder
episodeList.description: A young wife believes her house is haunted.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: The 4.50 From Paddington
episodeList.description: After Miss Marple's friend witnesses a murder in a railway carriage running parallel to her own, Miss Marple engages a resourceful young woman to investigate.

episodeList.title: MISS MARPLE: The Body in the Library
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Miss Marple/The Body in the Library.m4v
episodeList.description: Miss Marple assists her neighbours the Bantrys when a lovely young girl is found dead in their library.

episodeList.title: POIROT: Five Little Pigs
episodeList.description: Young Lucy Lemarchant asks Poirot to uncover the truth of the 14-year-old murder case in which her mother Caroline was hanged for poisoning her husband.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: Gorgons Wood
episodeList.description: A priceless Eastern porcelain monk is stolen in front of several witnesses, prompting Jonathan and Carla's discovery of a major case of sibling rivalry.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: Jack In The Box
episodeList.description: After Maddy successfully campaigns to free a man she believes to have been wrongly imprisoned for murder, the husband of the victim is found shot dead in his nuclear fall-out shelter.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: Miracle In Crooked Lane
episodeList.description: A former glamour model is seriously injured when her garden shed explodes.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: Mother Redcap
episodeList.description: A judge on a police protection programme is killed by a rapier blade into the chest, but only his sleeping wife was in the room at the time.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: No Trace Of Tracy
episodeList.description: Tracy, a teenager who loves seventies rock music, goes to visit her idol, retired rock star Roy Pilgrim.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: Satan's Chimney
episodeList.description: With Maddy gone to America on a book promotion tour, Jonathan teams up with Carla Borrego.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Chequered Box
episodeList.description: A police detective is photographed after apparently murdering a prosecutor by hanging her in her office.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Clue of the Savant's Thumb
episodeList.shortName: The Clue of the Savant's Thumb
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Jonathan Creek/The Clue of the Savant's Thumb.m4v
episodeList.description: Jonathan Creek has left magic and theatre behind and is now a high-powered businessman with a wife, Polly.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Coonskin Cap
episodeList.description: After an awkward break-up some months ago, Jonathan and Carla unite to investigate a serial killer who wears a Davy Crockett hat and kills people named after flowers.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Curious Tale Of Mr Spearfish
episodeList.shortName: The Curious Tale Of Mr Spearfish
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Jonathan Creek/The Curious Tale Of Mr Spearfish.mp4
episodeList.description: A man who claims to have sold his soul to the Devil has a remarkable run of good luck.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Eyes Of Tiresias
episodeList.description: When an old woman experiences dreams of the future, Jonathan must find out what is happening before her dreams of being attacked by a one-eyed man with a sword come to pass.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Grinning Man
episodeList.description: Since 1938, a number of people have disappeared from the attic of a Gothic mansion.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The House Of Monkeys
episodeList.description: A cancer doctor is found impaled by a sword in his locked study.

episodeList.title: POIROT: The Chocolate Box
episodeList.description: While in Belgium, Poirot recounts to Chief Inspector Japp a case from twenty years prior.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Scented Room
episodeList.description: A painting disappears from a locked room and the owner, theatre critic Sylvester Le Fley, offers a large reward for its recovery.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Seer Of The Sands
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-5/../Core/Jonathan Creek/The Seer Of The Sands.mp4
episodeList.description: A man who investigates supernatural occurrences kills himself by crashing his boat after receiving a fax from his lover.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Tailor's Dummy
episodeList.description: A designer commits suicide by jumping out of a window after reading a bad review of his work.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Three Gamblers
episodeList.description: A drug dealer and criminal who was shot six times in the head somehow managed to climb up the stairs from the cellar.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: The Wrestler's Tomb
episodeList.description: An artist is found dead at his home, while his mistress is found bound, blindfolded and gagged with tape.

episodeList.title: JONATHAN CREEK: Time Waits For Norman
episodeList.description: Antonia, a friend of Maddy's, asks her and Jonathan to discover what her husband has been up to after reliable witnesses place him on both sides of the Atlantic only minutes apart.
